patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/sync.py b/asgiref/sync.py
index 54496ef..8576c02 100644
--- a/asgiref/sync.py
+++ b/asgiref/sync.py
@@ -139,7 +139,7 @@ class AsyncToSync(Generic[_P, _R]):
         ],
         force_new_loop: bool = False,
     ):
-        if not callable(awaitable) or (
+        if not callable(awaitable) and (
             not iscoroutinefunction(awaitable)
             and not iscoroutinefunction(getattr(awaitable, "__call__", awaitable))
         ):
@@ -160,7 +160,6 @@ class AsyncToSync(Generic[_P, _R]):
         except RuntimeError:
             # There's no event loop in this thread.
             pass
-
     def __call__(self, *args: _P.args, **kwargs: _P.kwargs) -> _R:
         __traceback_hide__ = True  # noqa: F841
 
diff --git a/asgiref/wsgi.py b/asgiref/wsgi.py
index b9868e3..7fb113a 100644
--- a/asgiref/wsgi.py
+++ b/asgiref/wsgi.py
@@ -157,10 +157,10 @@ class WsgiToAsgiInstance:
             )
             bytes_sent += len(output)
             # The server should stop iterating over the response when enough data has been sent
-            if bytes_sent == self.response_content_length:
+            if bytes_sent >= self.response_content_length:
                 break
         # Close connection
         if not self.response_started:
             self.response_started = True
             self.sync_send(self.response_start)
-        self.sync_send({"type": "http.response.body"})
+        self.sync_send({"type": "http.response.body"})
\ No newline at end of file
